g.text: Unified data platform for AI and analytics (architecture)
Single data lake for the organization
Azure databases are mirrored to Fabric OneLake
Foundry agents consume data products via Foundry IQ
Common data domains are business units (Marketing, Sales, Finance) and product lines (product1, product2)
Single data catalog for all data across the organization
Data domains determine what data lands in Fabric
Data domains scan their data sources into the
Data Map, which populates the Unified Catalog.
Governance and security for the entire organization
